title: Watch 'Saving Cheetahs | Returning to Cheetah Conservation Fund' with Sandra
description: Educational vlog by zoologist Lindsay Nikole returning to the Cheetah Conservation Fund (CCF) in Namibia after 6 years. Key focuses: human-wildlife conflict mitigation, livestock guarding dogs, orphan care, and ecology tracking.

media_metadata.title: Saving Cheetahs | Returning to Cheetah Conservation Fund | Lindsay Nikole

curated_video_bookmarks.label: Interview with Dr. Laurie Marker (CCF Founder)
curated_video_bookmarks.note: Discusses how the wild population has dropped below 7,000 globally.

curated_video_bookmarks.label: The Livestock Guarding Dog Program
curated_video_bookmarks.note: Explains how Anatolian Shepherds and Kangals protect herds and drastically reduce cheetah conflict by 80-100%.

curated_video_bookmarks.label: Three Core Rules of Livestock Management
curated_video_bookmarks.note: Covers Fencing, Animal Health, and Seasonal Breeding strategies taught to local farmers.

curated_video_bookmarks.label: Cheetah Meat Prep & 'Predator Powder'
curated_video_bookmarks.note: How the CCF feeds orphan cheetahs clean meat with added essential nutrient supplements.

curated_video_bookmarks.label: Release Candidates Criteria
curated_video_bookmarks.note: Spotlight on cheetahs Atango and Zephyr, showing why natural human aversion and spitting are great indicators for a successful return to the wild.

app_features_placeholder.user_notes: Great option for an evening documentary night. Length is roughly 46 minutes.
